description:
The Ultimate Investment Tracker

Delta is an investment tracking app that helps you see everything you’ve invested in, all in one place.

Delta by eToro is the next generation of the Delta Investment Tracker. It’s built for investors who want a clear overview of their entire portfolio, even when their investments are spread across different asset types and platforms.

Delta supports a wide range of investments, including:
- Cryptocurrencies
- NFTs
- Stocks and funds
- Forex currencies and indices
Our goal is simple: if it has value and it’s an investment, we want you to be able to track it.

A complete portfolio overview
Delta helps you understand not just what you own, but how your investments are distributed. You can see your portfolio broken down by asset class, view everything combined, or focus on specific parts of your investments.

Whether you invest in individual stocks, follow major indices, hold crypto assets, or mix several asset types, Delta brings everything together into a single, easy-to-understand view.

Who Delta is for
Delta is designed for:
- Investors with assets across multiple platforms
- People who want insight without managing spreadsheets
- Long-term investors and active market followers alike
Delta doesn’t replace the platforms where you invest. Instead, it gives you clarity and perspective across all of them, helping you stay informed about your overall financial picture.
